Note: The sum of the extracted entries for this section (151 Pounds, 9 Shillings, 6.25 Pence) does not match this transcribed total (151 Pounds, 9 Shillings, 10.75 Pence), indicating a likely arithmetic error in the original ledger, but the transcription must reflect what is physically written on the page.
